headline: How The Essex Property Trust (ESS) Story Is Shifting With Tight Targets And Spring Leasing Risks
summary: Essex Property Trust just saw its fair value price target tweaked to US$278.13 from US$279, a small move that still keeps the stock in a tight range in the high US$270s. That shift lines up with recent Street targets clustering around US$271, US$278, and US$281, reflecting updated Q4 modeling and fresh views on multifamily occupancy and leasing. As you read on, you will see how these incremental target changes feed into the evolving story around Essex and what to watch next. Stay updated as...
